framework.name: Client Onboarding Process
framework.description: End-to-end SOP for onboarding new clients from signed contract to kickoff

context.agency_type_desc: Growing team needing standardized processes across departments.

steps.description: Create automated email sequence for new Real Estate clients including welcome, account setup instructions, stakeholder introduction, and kickoff scheduling. Tailor tone to CRM Integration scope.

Design comprehensive intake form collecting Real Estate client requirements, current tool stack, automation maturity level, success criteria, and compliance needs. Integrate with CRM Integration discovery process.
Structure kickoff meeting covering project scope, timeline, communication channels, success metrics for Real Estate client. Define CRM Integration deliverables and milestones.
Standard procedure for Discovery Document Template adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for System Access Setup Checklist adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Data Migration Protocol adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Integration Configuration Guide adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Client Dashboard Setup adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Reporting Schedule Template adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Internal Handoff Document adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Stakeholder Map adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
Standard procedure for Project Timeline Template adapted for Real Estate clients with CRM Integration focus.
